title: The White Phosphorus Matches Prohibition Act, 1913
full_text: The White Phosphorus Matches Prohibition Act, 1913 सफेद फास्‍फोरस दियासलाई प्रतिषेधअधिनियम, 1913 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 191305 Act Number: 05 Enactment Date: 1913-03-07 Act Year: 1913 Short Title: The White Phosphorus Matches Prohibition Act, 1913 Hindi Title: सफेद फास्‍फोरस दियासलाई प्रतिषेधअधिनियम, 1913 Long Title: An Act to prohibit the importation, manufacture and sale of matches made with white phosphorus. Ministry: Ministry of Home Affairs Department: Department of States Enforcement Date: 01-7-1913 (Except s. 6) 01-07-1914 TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles The White Phosphorus Matches Prohibition Act, 1913 Show all section Section 1. Short title, extent and commencement. Section 2. Definition. Section 3. [Repealed.]. Section 4. Prohibition of use of white phosphorus in manufacture of matches. Section 5. Power of Inspector of Factories to take samples of material used in manufacture. Section 6. Prohibition of sale.
